prose:
The frontier orbital energies for formaldehyde were computed using the `chemkit` `orbitals` skill.

**Formaldehyde frontier-orbital energies** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`. SCF converged. No warnings reported.
HOMO = -7.6523067 eV
LUMO = -1.7826355 eV

The calculation was trustworthy.
The full output can be found at: `formaldehyde_dft_orbitals.json`
The live log is being written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpqqmh9cr3/live.out`. You can `tail -f` this file to monitor the calculation in real-time.
